summary: Tested alternative_consumer_cash feature for Option 2 in CalcAuto AiPro. All 8 backend tests passed. Frontend UI correctly displays Option 1 and Option 2 columns in rates table, Option buttons with rebate amounts, and result cards with proper rebate values. The useCalculator hook correctly uses alternative_consumer_cash in the Option 2 principal calculation (deducted before taxes). Currently, all programs have alternative_consumer_cash = 0, so Option 2 shows '$0' for rebate - this is expected as users import corrected values from Excel.
critical_code_review_comments: useCalculator.ts line 135-139: Correctly uses altConsumerCash from selectedProgram.alternative_consumer_cash for Option 2 calculation
index.tsx line 2420: Option 2 button shows alternative_consumer_cash amount or '$0'
index.tsx line 2535: Option 2 result card shows alternative_consumer_cash as rebate
index.tsx line 1905-1909: Rebates summary shows 'Rabais Opt.2' when alternative_consumer_cash > 0
Backend programs.py correctly exports/imports alternative_consumer_cash field
context_for_next_testing_agent: The alternative_consumer_cash feature is fully implemented and working. Backend returns the field correctly. Frontend displays it in: 1) Option 2 button subtext (line 2420), 2) Option 2 result card rebate line (line 2535), 3) Rebates summary section 'Rabais Opt.2' (line 1905-1909), 4) Print view HTML (line 965, 1388-1389), 5) SMS share text (line 801). useCalculator.ts correctly deducts altConsumerCash from principal before taxes for Option 2 (line 134-139). All programs currently have alternative_consumer_cash = 0, but the UI and calculation are ready for when values are imported via Excel.

backend_api.GET /api/programs: Returns alternative_consumer_cash field for all programs
backend_api.Programs with option2_rates: 54 programs have option2_rates, all currently have alternative_consumer_cash = 0

frontend_ui.rates_table: Shows Option 1 AND Option 2 columns when program has option2_rates
frontend_ui.option_buttons: Option 1 shows consumer_cash + rate, Option 2 shows alternative_consumer_cash + rate (currently $0)
frontend_ui.result_cards: Option 1 shows Rabais: 1000$, Option 2 shows Rabais: $0 (as expected with current data)
frontend_ui.best_option_banner: Correctly calculates and displays 'Option 2 = Meilleur choix!' when Option 2 is better
frontend_ui.rebates_summary: Ready to show 'Rabais Opt.2' when alternative_consumer_cash > 0

calculation_logic.option1_principal: price + accessories - consumer_cash - rabais - echange + frais + taxes + dette - comptant - bonus
calculation_logic.option2_principal: price + accessories - alternative_consumer_cash - rabais - echange + frais + taxes + dette - comptant
